name: @omadia/plugin-deterministic-tools
description: Deterministic calculator + logic-inference tools for the byte5 Harness. Addresses LLM-weakness #1 (PoT / code execution), #2 (token counting), #3 (formal logical inference) from the May 2026 audit. Math-Delegation rule (default-on) forces the orchestrator LLM to call calc_* tools instead of computing inline.
